case_title: MICHAEL SHOUGH VS. ACE-USA/INSURANCE COMPANY OF AMERICA

docket_entries.description: MINI-MINUTES FOR SEP-18-2007 9:30 AM FOR DEPT 301
AMENDED PETITION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD FILED BY PETITIONER SHOUGH, MICHAEL

LAW AND MOTION 301, PETITIONER MICHAEL SHOUGH'S MOTION FOR ORDER TO CONFIRM ARBITRATION AWARD IS GRANTED. THE PARTIES HAVE STIPULATED TO THE CONFIRMATION OF THE AWARD. (STIPULATION TO CONFIRM CONTRACTUAL ARBITRATION AWARD STATES EACH PARTY WILL BEAR ITS OWN ATTORNEY'S FEES AND COURT COSTS) JUDGE: PETER J. BUSCH, REPORTER: CAROL KAREN, CSR #8189
